positive: A mesmerizing celestial forest scene, featuring bioluminescent flora and fauna set against a deep indigo and violet nebula background. The composition is symmetrical and highly stylized, focusing on clean, interlocking geometric elements and graceful, sweeping silhouettes. Foreground elements include stylized, glowing crystalline trees and abstract cosmic rivers flowing through the composition. Use a highly saturated, ethereal color palette—deep blues, magenta, teal, and glowing cyan accents. Cinematic, high-contrast rendering with soft radial lighting emanating from the glowing flora. Perfect for apparel transfer, vector style, intricate detail, UHD, maximalism.
